title: Trydeas: Meleez
description: +45 Melee Weapons with 3D Models for destroy Zombies! (or anything you want)
body:
#
![Trydeas: Meleez](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e611152695bec062772b1a90b8a3cb98752e9b79.png) #
**REQUIRES GECKOLIB AND HIGHLY RECOMMENDED BETTER COMBAT**

![All Weapons Render!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5eeba0da46dede2b9c067efdef43e6a01cff754.png)

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cf7318a08a943ffce73a1635481bb62bfef5033.png)

**EN:** Trydeas: Meleez is a straightforward mod that adds +45 melee weapons with 3D models, set in a modern apocalyptic world. Each weapon has its own crafting recipe in survival mode and is balanced to avoid offering an overwhelming advantage (though balancing is still in progress). You’ll find classic weapons like a wrench, crowbar, axes, or bats, as well as more improvised ones such as a dining knife, a chef’s fork, a metal pipe, or even a simple wooden plank with nails! **ES:** Trydeas: Meleez es un simple mod que agrega +45 Armas cuerpo a cuerpo con modelados 3D ambientadas en un mundo apocaliptico moderno. Todas cuentan con su propio crafteo en modo survival y estan niveladas para no suponer una ventaja absoluta (aún falta nivelar completamente). Podrás encontrar desde las armas mas típicas como una llave inglesa, palanqueta, hachas o bates, hasta las más improvisadas como un cuchillo de comer, un tenedor de cocinero, una tuberia de metal e incluso un simple tablón con clavos!

![Better Combat Compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a031147d75191f018a6788f6666acf0909c95fa.png)

**EN:** The mod is designed to be played alongside Better Combat, as it simplifies adding different reach ranges for attacking enemies. For instance, the wooden spear can strike from farther away compared to a butcher's knife (obviously, haha). **ES:** El mod está planeado para jugar con el mod Better Combat, ya que con el es mas sencillo agregar distinto alcance para golpear enemigos, por ejemplo, la lanza de madera puede golpear desde mas distancia que un cuchillo de carnicero (obviamente jaja).

![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6efda8bdeab6e0a92c9397a2e81b2019ad102858.png)
**EN:** - Requires Geckolib - It is HIGHLY RECOMMENDED to use Better Combat, as without it, weapons won't have different reach ranges, which may affect immersion. - Please do not use the assets from my mod or redistribute it on sites outside of Modrinth. Of course, I’d love to see it included in modpacks and featured in reviews! - I used Copilot to translate the description (Spanish to English). **ES:** - REQUIERE INSTALAR GECKOLIB. - Es ALTAMENTE RECOMENDADO USAR BETTER COMBAT ya que sin el las armas no tendrán distinto alcance y puede afectar la inmersión. - Por favor no usar los assets de mi mod ni redistribuirlo en otras páginas fuera de Modrinth. - Porsupuesto me encantaría verlo en modpacks y en reviews!

![Plans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/990233bcdf3a16e6ede30b9a48c83731f61414b7.png)
**EN:** - Add new weapons and mechanics, I’d also love to see suggestions! - Add custom crafting table for some weapons - Add compat for most used and requested mods - Improve current textures and models. - Balance current weapons. - Translate the mod to most requested languages. **ES:** - Agregar nuevas armas y mecanicas, tambien me gustaría ver sugerencias! - Mejorar texturas y modelos actuales. - Nivelar armas actuales. - Añadir una mesa de trabajo especial para craftear las armas.
